note: Planned v2 paths are an unbuilt target manager router (no scena-api Edge Function exists yet — see docs/API_V2.md). Edge function status values are verified against mcp__supabase__list_edge_functions, not inferred from repo source. Per docs/sop/Purpose.md §16: source existing is not the same claim as deployed, and deployed is not the same claim as functionally verified.

statusLegend.planned: No source exists yet. Design intent only.
statusLegend.source_created: Source exists in supabase/functions/, but mcp__supabase__list_edge_functions does not list it as deployed.
statusLegend.deployed_unused: Deployed and ACTIVE per mcp__supabase__list_edge_functions, but no current src/ code path calls it.
statusLegend.live: Deployed, ACTIVE, and called by a current src/ code path.
statusLegend.not_in_repository: No tracked source exists. An untracked local directory or file may exist on disk (git does not track empty directories), but it is not a repository capability and must not be described as 'source exists' or 'empty directory in the repo' — neither claim is accurate for untracked content.

/v2/teams/current.description: Active Team context for the authenticated manager. No scena-api router exists to serve this.

/v2/boards.description: List or create Boards. Provisional mapping only — the live schema has no boards table; the nearest analog is display_layouts. See docs/DATABASE_SCHEMA.md 'Vocabulary gap'.

/v2/displays.description: List Displays owned by the authenticated Team. Live analog table: screens.

/v2/displays/{display_id}/credential-rot.description: Rotate a Display's device credential. Live analog: screen-credential-rotate (source_created, not deployed — see liveEdgeFunctions).

/v2/sessions.description: List or create Sessions. Live analog table: display_sessions.

/v2/menus.description: List or create Menus. Live analog table: menus.

/v2/scenes.description: List or create Scenes tied to Menus or Presentations. Live analog table: scenes.

/v2/layouts.description: List or create Layouts. Live analog table: display_layouts — overlaps with /v2/boards above; not yet reconciled into one canonical resource. See docs/DATABASE_SCHEMA.md.

/v2/presentations.description: List Presentation assets and metadata. Live analog table: presentation_assets. SOP canonical term is 'Asset', not 'Presentation' — not yet reconciled.

/v2/automations.description: List or create Automations. Live analog: automations-run (source_created, not deployed) and table display_automations.

pathsCaveat: These 12 paths were introduced in v1.0.5 without a recorded design decision (no scena-api source, no per-resource ADR). docs/API_V2_PROGRESS.md Session 1 Phase 2 explicitly kept openapi.json/api-inventory.json paths EMPTY on the grounds that fabricating unbuild routes creates a false 'endpoint exists' impression. Treat this paths block as an unreviewed proposal, not a ratified target contract, until an owner confirms it.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: mjcc-sso-exchange
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Legacy MJCC SSO exchange. Superseded by native Supabase Auth (Google OAuth + email link) in API_V2_PROGRESS.md Session 1 Phase 1.
liveEdgeFunctions.frontendReferenceStatus: no active reference found (src/auth/sso.ts and src/app/useSsoExchange.ts, its only callers, were deleted per API_V2_PROGRESS.md Session 1 Phase 1)
liveEdgeFunctions.runtimeStatus: deprecated behavior confirmed at the currently deployed version — re-verified via mcp__supabase__get_logs this session: version 9 (currently deployed) returned OPTIONS 404 at 2026-07-21T19:27 UTC. An earlier deployment, version 4, had returned POST 410 at 2026-07-21T06:04 UTC, but that is a superseded version, not the current one. No POST request against version 9 appeared in the available log window, so the current version's exact POST response is not directly observed — only that it is not serving normal SSO traffic (404 on OPTIONS is itself abnormal for a CORS preflight).
liveEdgeFunctions.notes: CORRECTED: a prior draft of this file stated 'returns HTTP 410 Gone' as a current fact, sourced from a different (superseded) deployment's historical logs. Deletion is explicitly deferred to a later cleanup phase, not yet done.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: display-gateway
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Kiosk polling endpoint for resolved display state and live scene/layout content.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: screen-claim
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Manager pairing flow that consumes a pairing code and assigns a kiosk to an organization and location.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: presentation-upload
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Create presentation ingestion jobs and confirm upload with the LXC service.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: billing-checkout
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Create Stripe Checkout sessions and persist checkout state.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: billing-portal
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Create Stripe Billing Portal sessions for an existing billing customer.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: billing-webhook
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Ingest Stripe events, deduplicate them, and synchronize subscription status to the database.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: screen-register
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Kiosk registration, device credential issuance, and short-lived pairing code creation. src/lib/display.ts calls this by name, but it is not currently deployed.
liveEdgeFunctions.notes: CORRECTED from prior README/inventory which marked this 'live'. It is NOT in mcp__supabase__list_edge_functions' deployed set. Because screen-claim (deployed) has nothing to claim without screen-register (not deployed), the full kiosk registration-and-pairing flow described in docs/sop/Purpose.md §12 Stage 8 cannot currently complete end to end in production.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: screen-credential-rotate
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Rotate a claimed screen's credential and return the new device token once.
liveEdgeFunctions.notes: CORRECTED from prior README/inventory which marked this 'live'. Not in the deployed set.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: presentation-callback
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: LXC callback for presentation processing completion or failure.
liveEdgeFunctions.notes: CORRECTED from prior README/inventory which marked this 'live'. Not in the deployed set. presentation-upload (deployed) can create ingestion jobs, but nothing deployed currently reports their completion back.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: automations-run
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: Scheduler/worker endpoint that claims due automations and executes session/display actions.
liveEdgeFunctions.notes: CORRECTED from prior README/inventory which marked this 'live'. Not in the deployed set. display_automations rows can be created but nothing deployed currently executes them.

liveEdgeFunctions.name: marquee-sso
liveEdgeFunctions.path: not applicable — no tracked implementation exists
liveEdgeFunctions.purpose: No tracked marquee-sso implementation source was found. A local empty directory (supabase/functions/marquee-sso/, no index.ts, untracked by git — git does not track empty directories) may exist on disk, but it is not a repository capability: not committed, not deployed, not documented anywhere prior to this pass. Likely a leftover from the product's earlier 'Marquee' name, before the product was renamed to Scena.
liveEdgeFunctions.notes: CORRECTED: an earlier draft of this entry called it 'source' and separately called it 'empty' in different places — those are contradictory. The accurate statement is the purpose field above. Flagged for an owner decision: create real source under this name if it's still needed, or remove the stray local directory; either way it does not currently exist as repository-tracked capability.

supabase.serviceRole: Used by edge functions for privileged database operations and manager JWT resolution.
supabase.edgeFunctions: Live function boundary for kiosk, billing, automation, and presentation workflows.
supabase.realtimeBroadcast: Org-scoped broadcast channel used for kiosk invalidation when display state changes.

stripe.checkout: Billing checkout session creation and plan mapping.
stripe.webhooks: Subscription lifecycle and payment event synchronization.

lxcPresentationService.jobBroker: presentation-upload creates jobs and returns upload URLs. Deployed.
lxcPresentationService.callback: presentation-callback receives processing completion and ready manifest keys. NOT deployed — see liveEdgeFunctions.

scheduler.automationWorker: automations-run executes scheduled actions and reschedules cron/once automations. NOT deployed — see liveEdgeFunctions.
